name_en: 🍁 Maple Leaf Color! Versatile color style 🌬🌟🌟 In Stock! CHANEL 2024 CF Sequin Bag. I fell in love with the black one at first glance. If you like it, one look is enough. The Maple Leaf🍁 color is very spring-like. Considering durability and a premium feel, I didn't hesitate to get the black one. This CF sequin bag is more eye-catching than the leather version. Practical capacity and moderate size, a style worth collecting! Size: 20cm
